concerns.text: The MATH dataset URL cited (open-web-math/open-web-math) is incorrect for this study. The 'open-web-math' dataset is a collection of web-scraped math text, not the structured 'MATH' benchmark (Hendrycks et al.) containing the specific 'solution' and 'level' fields required for the APPO rollout and difficulty stratification described in the plan. The plan requires the canonical 'MATH' dataset (e.g., `huggingface/datasets/hendrycks/math`) to ensure the 'reasoning traces' and 'difficulty levels' match the experimental design. Using the wrong dataset will result in missing fields or incompatible data structures.

The 'CPU-Only Reference' dataset (AdityaMayukhSom/MixSub-LLaMA-3.2-Text-Only-Overlap-CPU-Score) appears to be a synthetic or user-uploaded artifact rather than a canonical, verified source for the primary experimental variables. Relying on a non-canonical dataset for 'validation of CPU inference stability' introduces a risk of data drift or incompatibility with the GSM8K/MATH tokenization logic. The plan should either cite a standard benchmark subset for this validation or remove the dependency on this specific user-uploaded dataset to ensure reproducibility.
